fields.Name: ListConversationDetailFeedbackStats
fields.UserQuestion: What are the aggregate counts and average for conversation feedback ratings (matching the same filters as the row-level query)?
fields.Description: Aggregate companion for ListConversationDetailFeedback. Returns Total, AvgRating, PositiveCount (>=8), and NegativeCount (<=3) over the same filtered universe (StartDate, EndDate, MinRating, MaxRating, AgentID, SearchText). Used by the Agent Feedback admin page to populate the four stat cards.
fields.TechnicalDescription: Single aggregate SELECT against __mj.ConversationDetail WHERE UserRating IS NOT NULL with the same LEFT JOINs and Nunjucks filter blocks as ListConversationDetailFeedback. Returns four scalars in a single row.
